recommendations.title: The Execution of Mary, Queen of Scots
recommendations.overview: A short film depicting the execution of Mary, Queen of the Scots. Mary is brought to the execution block and made to kneel down with her neck over it. The executioner lifts his axe ready to bring it down. After that frame Mary has been replaced by a

recommendations.title: Blacksmithing Scene
recommendations.overview: Three men hammer on an anvil and pass a bottle of beer around. Notable for being the first film in which a scene is being acted out.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and KISS: Rock and Roll Mystery
recommendations.overview: Get ready to Rock! Scooby-Doo and the Mystery Inc. Gang team up with the one and only KISS in this all-new, out-of-this-world adventure! We join the Gang at KISS World – the all-things-KISS theme park, as they investigate a series of strange haunting

recommendations.title: Monkeyshines, No. 1
recommendations.overview: Experimental film made to test the original cylinder format of the Kinetoscope and believed to be the first film shot in the United States. It shows a blurry figure in white standing in one place making large gestures and is only a few seconds long.

recommendations.title: The Kissing Booth
recommendations.overview: When teenager Elle's first kiss leads to a forbidden romance with the hottest boy in high school, she risks her relationship with her best friend.

recommendations.title: Danse serpentine (Annabelle)
recommendations.overview: In a long, diaphanous skirt, held out by her hands with arms extended, Broadway dancer Annabelle Moore performs. Her dance emphasizes the movement of the flowing cloth. She moves to her right and left across an unadorned stage. Many of the prints wer

recommendations.title: Dickson Experimental Sound Film
recommendations.overview: William K.L. Dickson plays the violin while two men dance. This is the oldest surviving sound film where sound is recorded on the phonograph.

recommendations.title: The Man Who Laughs
recommendations.overview: When a proud noble refuses to kiss the hand of the despotic King James in 1690, he is cruelly executed and his son surgically disfigured.

recommendations.title: Kizumonogatari Part 1: Tekketsu
recommendations.overview: One day, Koyomi Araragi encounters the horrifying vampire, Kiss-shot Acerola-orion Heart-under-blade A.K.A. the "King of Apparitions." He saves the fatally wounded Kiss-shot by offering his blood at the expense of his own life as a human. Now Koyomi

recommendations.title: The Black Devil and the White Prince
recommendations.overview: Yū Akahane moves to a dormitory room after her father's transfer from work. She is excited that she will live in the same dorm as Takumi Shirakawa, aka "White Prince." Yet, Haruto Kurosaki, aka "Black Devil", kisses her as punishment for going agains
